name: citoyen-peyi
description: Application de vote anonyme — Citoyen Peyi

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix app/backend && bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter pub get'
scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:frontend: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter run -d web-server --web-hostname 0.0.0.0 --web-port=8081 --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4000} --dart-define=FIREBASE_API_KEY=${FIREBASE_API_KEY:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_APP_ID=${FIREBASE_APP_ID:-}'
scripts.build: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter build web --release --base-href /citoyen-peyi/ --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4000} --dart-define=FIREBASE_API_KEY=${FIREBASE_API_KEY:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_APP_ID=${FIREBASE_APP_ID:-}'
scripts.test:flutter: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter test'
scripts.lint: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter analyze'
